rules.rule: Comments must only be used to explain what code cannot express — non-obvious intent, inaccessible code, or complex logic.
Copyright headers must use the exact dashed-line // format.
Methods performing inaccessible or complex operations must be documented with Purposing, Incomes, Outcomes, and Side Effects.
Comments must not restate what the code already clearly expresses.
Copyright headers must not use /* */ block comment syntax.
Copyright headers must not use XML <copyright> tag syntax.
